entity.label: Mount Shapher
entity.subtitle: Mountain
entity.description: Brightness, one of the stations where Israel encamped in the wilderness (Num. 33:23, 24).

nodes.label: Mount Shapher
nodes.description: Brightness, one of the stations where Israel encamped in the wilderness (Num. 33:23, 24).

verses.text: And they went from Kehelathah, and pitched in mount Shapher.
And they removed from mount Shapher, and encamped in Haradah.
